_comment: Canonical external/immutable mainnet addresses that no deployment broadcast ever produces (third-party contracts) plus the Phase-1 immutable PhUSD. This file is the durable preservation source merged into mainnet-addresses.ts on every chainId-1 codegen run (server/generate-ts-addresses.js). Values must match the current mainnet-addresses.ts. Do NOT use the local mock SkyPSM (0xc351...1181) here — the real mainnet Sky USDS PSM wrapper is 0xA188EEC8F81263234dA3622A406892F3D630f98c.
